creator: lippy@youth-initiatives.org
text:
FreeBSD 8.1 and 8.2 currently appear to install and run fine on Hyper-V with
VHDs smaller than 32GB in size,

I suspect the bug has to do with memory handling for the virtual hardware
considering segfaults and bus errors occur during setup

This probably applies to David's bug report @
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=amd64/153496 as well.
